    Index

    A B C D E F H I L M N O P Q R S T U V X Y 与 约 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    abiVersion() - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    查询原生侧 ABI 版本整数；库未加载或调用失败时返回 -1。
    abiVersion() - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    ABI 版本号；未加载原生库时为 -1。

    B

    BAD_DIMENSION - Static variable in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpcStatus
    Java 侧维度/长度不匹配或非法参数。
    bundledLibraryFileName() - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.HpcNativePlatform
    与 HpcNativeLoader 在 JAR 内查找的资源文件名一致： Windows 为 .dll，macOS 为 .dylib，其余 Unix 常为 .so。

    C

    cholesky(double[][]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    SPD（对称正定）Cholesky：A = L Lᵀ，返回下三角 L（行主序 n×n，严格上三角为 0）。
    choleskyLowerColMajor(int, double[], double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    SPD Cholesky：A 与输出的 L 均为 n×n 列主序下三角约定（上三角未定义/填 0）。
    CholeskyResult - Record Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    SPD Cholesky 下三角因子 L（行主序 n×n，上三角为 0）。
    CholeskyResult(int, double[][]) - Constructor for record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.CholeskyResult
    Creates an instance of a CholeskyResult record class.
    classifier() - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.HpcNativePlatform
    例如 windows-x86_64、linux-aarch_64、osx-x86_64。
    colInd() - Method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LpCsrMatrix
    列下标，长度 nnz，与 LpCsrMatrix.values() 对齐。
    colMajorPackedToRowMajorMatrix(double[], int, int, double[][]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.HpcLayouts
    列主序 packed → 行主序写回已有 dst（dst.length 至少 rows，每行长度 cols）。
    colMajorPackedToRowMajorNew(double[], int, int) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.HpcLayouts
    列主序 packed → 新分配的行主序 rows×cols 矩阵。
    com.yishape.lab.math.hpc - module com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
     
    com.yishape.lab.math.hpc - package com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    YiShape Math HPC：通过 JDK FFM 调用原生库 yishape_math_rust（faer 稠密线代 + HiGHS 线性规划）， 针对主库 yishape-math 中纯 Java 或可选 OpenBLAS 仍显吃力的场景。
    com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal - package com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal
    供 YishapeHpc 使用的内部实现：不应作为稳定对外 API 依赖。

    D

    DECOMPOSITION_FAILED - Static variable in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpcStatus
    分解类算法失败（如数值问题）。
    denseInverseColMajor(int, double[], double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    稠密方阵求逆，aColMajor 与 invOut 均为 n×n 列主序。
    denseLuColMajor(int, double[], double[], double[], int[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    稠密 LU 分解，lOut 与 uOut 列主序 n×n，pOut 长度 n。
    denseQrColMajor(int, int, double[], double[], double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    稠密 QR 分解，qOut 列主序 m×m，rOut 列主序 m×n。
    DenseSolveResult - Record Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    稠密方阵求解 YishapeHpc.solveSquare(double[][], double[]) 的结果。
    DenseSolveResult(int, double[]) - Constructor for record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.DenseSolveResult
    Creates an instance of a DenseSolveResult record class.
    denseSvdColMajor(int, int, double[], double[], double[], double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    稠密 SVD（列主序）。
    distances() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.HnswSearchResult
    Returns the value of the distances record component.

    E

    eigenNonsymmetric(double[][]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    非对称实矩阵特征分解 A = U S U^{-1}；A 行主序 n×n。
    eigenNonsymmetricColMajor(int, double[], double[], double[], double[], double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    非对称特征分解，aColMajor n×n；evalsReal/Imag 长度 n；evecsReal/Imag 列主序 n×n。
    eigenSymmetric(double[][]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    实对称阵特征分解：A Z = Z Λ，列特征向量（存于行主序二维数组中）。
    eigenvaluesAscending() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SymmetricEigenResult
    Returns the value of the eigenvaluesAscending record component.
    eigenvaluesImag() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.NonsymmetricEigenResult
    Returns the value of the eigenvaluesImag record component.
    eigenvaluesReal() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.NonsymmetricEigenResult
    Returns the value of the eigenvaluesReal record component.
    eigenvectors() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SymmetricEigenResult
    Returns the value of the eigenvectors record component.
    eigenvectorsImag() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.NonsymmetricEigenResult
    Returns the value of the eigenvectorsImag record component.
    eigenvectorsReal() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.NonsymmetricEigenResult
    Returns the value of the eigenvectorsReal record component.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.CholeskyResult
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.DenseSolveResult
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.HnswSearchResult
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.InverseResult
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LbfgsResult
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LpNonnegativeResult
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LuResult
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.MultiRhsSolveResult
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.NonsymmetricEigenResult
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.QrResult
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SvdResult
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SymmetricEigenResult
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    evaluate(double[], double[]) - Method in interface com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc.LbfgsEvaluateFunction
     

    F

    found() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.HnswSearchResult
    Returns the value of the found record component.
    fromCoo(int, int, int[], int[], double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LpCsrMatrix
    自 COO 构造 CSR：rows[k],cols[k],vals[k] 为一条非零。
    fx() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LbfgsResult
    Returns the value of the fx record component.

    H

    Returns a hash code value for this object.

    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LbfgsResult
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LpNonnegativeResult
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LuResult
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.MultiRhsSolveResult
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.NonsymmetricEigenResult
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.QrResult
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SvdResult

    hashCode() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SymmetricEigenResult
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    HNSW_DIMENSION_MISMATCH - Static variable in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpcStatus
    HNSW：维度不匹配。
    HNSW_DUPLICATE_ID - Static variable in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpcStatus
    HNSW：重复点 ID。
    HNSW_INVALID_HANDLE - Static variable in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpcStatus
    HNSW：无效句柄。
    HNSW_NOT_FOUND - Static variable in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpcStatus
    HNSW：点未找到。
    HNSW_PANIC - Static variable in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpcStatus
    HNSW：原生 panic（已通过 catch_unwind 捕获，不会崩溃 JVM）。
    hnswAddF32(long, long, float[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    向 HNSW 索引添加单条 f32 向量。
    hnswAddF32(long, long, float[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    向现有 HNSW 索引插入单条 f32 向量。
    hnswBuildF32(int, float[], long[], int, int, int, int) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    从初始 f32 向量批次构建 HNSW 近似索引。
    hnswBuildF32(int, int, float[], long[], int, int, int, int) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    从初始 f32 向量批次构建 HNSW 索引。
    hnswFree(long) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    释放 HNSW 索引及关联内存。
    hnswFree(long) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    释放 HNSW 索引及全部关联内存。
    hnswGetF32(long, long, float[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    按 ID 取回存储的 f32 向量。
    hnswGetF32(long, long, float[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    按 ID 取回存储的 f32 向量。
    hnswSearchF32(long, float[], int) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    HNSW k-NN 搜索。
    hnswSearchF32(long, float[], int, long[], float[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    HNSW k-NN 搜索；结果写入预分配数组。
    HnswSearchResult - Record Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    HNSW 近似最近邻搜索结果。
    HnswSearchResult(int, long[], float[], int) - Constructor for record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.HnswSearchResult
    Creates an instance of a HnswSearchResult record class.
    hnswSetEf(long, int) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    设置 ef_search（越大召回率越高、延迟越大）。
    hnswSetEf(long, int) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    设置 ef_search（影响召回率与延迟的权衡）。
    hnswSize(long) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    返回索引当前包含的向量数。
    hnswSize(long, int[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    返回索引中当前点数。
    HpcLayouts - Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal
    行主序 double[][]（与 yishape-math 常用 toDoubleArray() 布局一致）与原生列主序打包数组互转。
    HpcNativeLoader - Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal
    加载动态库 yishape_math_rust，解析顺序为： 系统属性 yishape.hpc.library.path（绝对路径，见 System.load(String)RESTRICTED） Classpath / 模块路径上 JAR 内资源 META-INF/native-libs/<classifier>/<文件名>（解压到临时文件后 System.load(String)RESTRICTED） System.loadLibrary(String)RESTRICTED 按平台默认库名搜索路径 临时文件在 VM 退出时按 File.deleteOnExit() 清理。
    HpcNativePlatform - Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal
    与 Maven os-maven-plugin 的 ${os.detected.classifier} 对齐，用于在 JAR 内定位 META-INF/native-libs/<classifier>/<file>。

    I

    ids() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.HnswSearchResult
    Returns the value of the ids record component.
    inv() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.InverseResult
    Returns the value of the inv record component.
    inverse(double[][]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    稠密方阵求逆 A^{-1}，A 行主序 n×n。
    InverseResult - Record Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    稠密方阵求逆结果。
    InverseResult(int, double[][]) - Constructor for record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.InverseResult
    Creates an instance of a InverseResult record class.
    isHnswAvailable() - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    原生库是否导出 HNSW 符号。
    isHnswNativeAvailable() - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    当前加载的原生库是否导出 HNSW 符号。
    isMilpMinimizeNonnegativeAvailable() - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    是否已绑定 yishape_hpc_milp_minimize_nonneg（旧版仅有 LP 的原生库为 false）。
    isMixedIntegerLpNativeAvailable() - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    当前加载的原生库是否导出 MILP（混合整数）入口。
    isNativeAvailable() - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    是否已成功加载 yishape_math_rust 并完成符号绑定。
    isNativeRuntimeAvailable() - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    是否已成功加载 yishape_math_rust 并完成符号解析。

    L

    l() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LuResult
    Returns the value of the l record component.
    lbfgsMinimize(double[], int, double, int, YishapeHpc.LbfgsEvaluateFunction) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    L-BFGS 无约束最小化。
    lbfgsMinimize(double[], int, int, double, int, MemorySegment, MemorySegment, double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    L-BFGS 最小化（原始 FFM）。
    LbfgsResult - Record Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    L-BFGS / OWL-QN 优化结果。
    LbfgsResult(int, double[], double) - Constructor for record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LbfgsResult
    Creates an instance of a LbfgsResult record class.
    lLower() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.CholeskyResult
    Returns the value of the lLower record component.
    loadYishapeMathRust() - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.HpcNativeLoader
     
    LP_INFEASIBLE - Static variable in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpcStatus
    线性规划不可行。
    LP_UNBOUNDED - Static variable in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpcStatus
    线性规划无界。
    LpCsrMatrix - Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    线性约束矩阵 A 的 CSR 形式（m 约束 × n 变量）：适合直接交给 YishapeHpc.lpSparse(double[], double[], double[], LpCsrMatrix, double[], double[])。
    lpMinimizeMixedIntegerNonnegative(int, int, int, double[], double[], double[], double[], double[], int[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    稠密非负 MILP；integrality 与 YishapeHpc.lpMixedIntegerNonnegative(double[], double[][], double[], double[][], double[], int[]) 一致。
    lpMinimizeNonnegative(int, int, int, double[], double[], double[], double[], double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    稠密非负 LP：目标与约束数组均为列主序行块（与 YishapeHpc.lpNonnegative(double[], double[][], double[], double[][], double[]) 一致）。
    lpMinimizeSparseCsr(int, int, int, double[], double[], double[], int[], int[], double[], double[], double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    稀疏 CSR LP；数组布局与 HiGHS 封装约定一致，rowPtr 长度 m+1 且 rowPtr[0]=0、rowPtr[m]=nnz。
    lpMixedIntegerNonnegative(double[], double[][], double[], double[][], double[], int[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    稠密非负 MILP：在 YishapeHpc.lpNonnegative(double[], double[][], double[], double[][], double[]) 相同约束下，按 integrality[j] 指定列类型： 0 连续，1 非负整数，2 0-1。
    lpNonnegative(double[], double[][], double[], double[][], double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    稠密非负 LP：最小化 cᵀx，s.t.
    LpNonnegativeResult - Record Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    HiGHS 线性规划 / 混合整数规划求解结果（稠密非负形式或稀疏 CSR 等形式共用）。
    LpNonnegativeResult(int, double, double[]) - Constructor for record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LpNonnegativeResult
    Creates an instance of a LpNonnegativeResult record class.
    lpSparse(double[], double[], double[], LpCsrMatrix, double[], double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    稀疏 CSR 形式 LP：约束矩阵为 m×n，非零结构由 LpCsrMatrix 描述； 列界、行界与 HiGHS 语义一致（可为 ±∞ 表示无界）。
    lu(double[][]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    稠密 LU 分解 P A = L U，A 行主序 n×n。
    LuResult - Record Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    稠密 LU 分解结果 P A = L U。
    LuResult(int, double[][], double[][], int[]) - Constructor for record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LuResult
    Creates an instance of a LuResult record class.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeMathHpc
    入口：无参时也可直接运行以观察是否能在当前环境加载原生侧。
    matmulColMajor(int, int, int, double[], double[], double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    稠密矩阵乘 C = A×B，三者均为列主序 packed：A 为 m×n，B 为 n×p，cColOut 为 m×p。
    MultiRhsSolveResult - Record Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    多右端项线性求解 AX=B 结果。
    MultiRhsSolveResult(int, double[][]) - Constructor for record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.MultiRhsSolveResult
    Creates an instance of a MultiRhsSolveResult record class.

    N

    nnz() - Method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LpCsrMatrix
    非零元个数；满足 rowPtr[m] == nnz。
    NonsymmetricEigenResult - Record Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    非对称实矩阵特征分解结果 A = U S U^{-1}。
    NonsymmetricEigenResult(int, double[], double[], double[][], double[][]) - Constructor for record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.NonsymmetricEigenResult
    Creates an instance of a NonsymmetricEigenResult record class.
    NOT_POSITIVE_DEFINITE - Static variable in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpcStatus
    Cholesky：矩阵非正定。
    NULL_POINTER - Static variable in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpcStatus
    原生侧空指针（或等效 ABI 错误）。
    numConstraints() - Method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LpCsrMatrix
    约束（行）数 m。
    numVariables() - Method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LpCsrMatrix
    变量（列）数 n。

    O

    objective() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LpNonnegativeResult
    Returns the value of the objective record component.
    ok() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.CholeskyResult
    是否 YishapeHpcStatus.OK。
    ok() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.DenseSolveResult
    是否 YishapeHpcStatus.OK。
    ok() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.HnswSearchResult
    是否成功返回结果（状态码为 YishapeHpcStatus.OK）。
    ok() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.InverseResult
     
    ok() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LbfgsResult
     
    ok() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LpNonnegativeResult
    是否 YishapeHpcStatus.OK（LP 最优收敛）。
    ok() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LuResult
     
    ok() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.MultiRhsSolveResult
     
    ok() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.NonsymmetricEigenResult
     
    ok() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.QrResult
     
    ok() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SvdResult
    是否 YishapeHpcStatus.OK。
    ok() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SymmetricEigenResult
    是否 YishapeHpcStatus.OK。
    OK - Static variable in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpcStatus
    成功。
    owlqnMinimize(double[], int, double, int, double, YishapeHpc.LbfgsEvaluateFunction) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    OWL-QN（L1 正则化 L-BFGS）最小化。
    owlqnMinimize(double[], int, int, double, int, double, MemorySegment, MemorySegment, double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    OWL-QN 最小化（原始 FFM）。

    P

    p() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LuResult
    Returns the value of the p record component.

    Q

    q() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.QrResult
    Returns the value of the q record component.
    qr(double[][]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    稠密 QR 分解 A = Q R，A 行主序 m×n。
    QrResult - Record Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    稠密 QR 分解结果 A = Q R。
    QrResult(int, double[][], double[][]) - Constructor for record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.QrResult
    Creates an instance of a QrResult record class.

    R

    r() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.QrResult
    Returns the value of the r record component.
    rowMajorMatrixToColMajorPacked(double[][], int, int, double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.HpcLayouts
    矩形矩阵：行主序 a[i][j] → 列主序打包 dst[j * rows + i]。
    rowMajorRectToColMajorPacked(double[][], int, int, double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.HpcLayouts
    同 HpcLayouts.rowMajorMatrixToColMajorPacked(double[][], int, int, double[])； m×n 展平长度为 m*n。
    rowPtr() - Method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LpCsrMatrix
    CSR 行偏移，长度 m+1；第 r 行非零列为 colInd[rowPtr[r] .. rowPtr[r+1])。

    S

    singularValues() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SvdResult
    Returns the value of the singularValues record component.
    solveLinearSystem(double[], int, double[], double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    解 A x = b：A 为 n×n 列主序 packed，与 b、x 在 downcall 期间由堆段映射到原生。
    solveMultiRhs(double[][], double[][]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    多右端项求解 AX=B，A 与 B 均为行主序；B 为 n×k。
    solveMultiRhsColMajor(double[], int, double[], int, double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    多右端项求解 AX=B，A 列主序 n×n，bColMajor 列主序 n×nrhs，xColMajorOut 列主序 n×nrhs。
    SOLVER_FAILED - Static variable in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpcStatus
    求解器内部失败。
    solveSquare(double[][], double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    解稠密方阵线性方程 A x = b（一般稠密，不假设对称）。
    status() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.CholeskyResult
    Returns the value of the status record component.
    status() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.DenseSolveResult
    Returns the value of the status record component.
    status() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.HnswSearchResult
    Returns the value of the status record component.
    status() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.InverseResult
    Returns the value of the status record component.
    status() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LbfgsResult
    Returns the value of the status record component.
    status() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LpNonnegativeResult
    Returns the value of the status record component.
    status() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LuResult
    Returns the value of the status record component.
    status() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.MultiRhsSolveResult
    Returns the value of the status record component.
    status() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.NonsymmetricEigenResult
    Returns the value of the status record component.
    status() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.QrResult
    Returns the value of the status record component.
    status() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SvdResult
    Returns the value of the status record component.
    status() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SymmetricEigenResult
    Returns the value of the status record component.
    svd(double[][]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    稠密 SVD：A ≈ U Σ Vᵀ，与 yishape-math 形状约定一致。
    SvdResult - Record Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    稠密 SVD，与 yishape-math 约定一致：U 瘦型行主序 m×k，Vᵀ 行主序 n×n，σ 长度 k。
    SvdResult(int, double[][], double[], double[][]) - Constructor for record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SvdResult
    Creates an instance of a SvdResult record class.
    symmetricEigenColMajor(int, double[], double[], double[]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    实对称特征分解：A 列主序 n×n；特征值写入 eigenvaluesOut，特征向量矩阵列主序 n×n 写入 eigenvectorsColMajorOut。
    SymmetricEigenResult - Record Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    实对称阵特征分解；特征值按 faer 为非降序。
    SymmetricEigenResult(int, double[], double[][]) - Constructor for record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SymmetricEigenResult
    Creates an instance of a SymmetricEigenResult record class.

    T

    testHello() - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal.YishapeMathRust
    调用原生测试符号；未加载时静默返回。
    testHello() - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    调用原生侧连通性测试符号；若库未成功加载则静默返回（不抛异常）。
    toString() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.CholeskyResult
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.DenseSolveResult
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.HnswSearchResult
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.InverseResult
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LbfgsResult
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LpNonnegativeResult
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LuResult
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.MultiRhsSolveResult
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.NonsymmetricEigenResult
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.QrResult
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SvdResult
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SymmetricEigenResult
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    tryMatMul(double[][], double[][]) - Static method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
    稠密 C = A × B（行主序）。

    U

    u() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LuResult
    Returns the value of the u record component.
    u() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SvdResult
    Returns the value of the u record component.

    V

    values() - Method in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LpCsrMatrix
    非零值，长度 nnz。
    vt() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.SvdResult
    Returns the value of the vt record component.

    X

    x() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.DenseSolveResult
    Returns the value of the x record component.
    x() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LbfgsResult
    Returns the value of the x record component.
    x() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LpNonnegativeResult
    Returns the value of the x record component.
    x() - Method in record class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.MultiRhsSolveResult
    Returns the value of the x record component.

    Y

    YishapeHpc - Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    yishape-math-hpc 对业务代码的唯一推荐入口：所有矩阵均为行主序 double[][]（与 yishape-math 一致），列主序打包与 CSR 细节由本类委托给内部实现。
    YishapeHpc.LbfgsEvaluateFunction - Interface in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    供 L-BFGS / OWL-QN 求解器使用的评价函数接口。
    YishapeHpcStatus - Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    与 yishape_math_rust C ABI 约定一致的整数状态码；各 API 的 status 字段与此对齐。
    YishapeMathHpc - Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
    命令行冒烟示例：打印 ABI、调用 YishapeHpc.testHello()、演示 YishapeHpc.solveSquare(double[][], double[]) 与 YishapeHpc.lpNonnegative(double[], double[][], double[], double[][], double[])。
    YishapeMathRust - Class in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal
    底层 FFM：仅列主序 / CSR 裸数组。

    与

    与 yishape-math 的互补关系 - Section in package com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
     

    约

    约定 - Section in class com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.YishapeHpc
